name: Iron Eagle Golf
about: Iron Eagle Golf is an indoor golf facility featuring TrackMan simulator technology, providing year-round access to practice and play. The facility operates on a 24/7 access model under certain conditions, with hourly bay rentals and flexible membership options available. Designed for golfers to hone their skills in a climate-controlled environment, it emphasizes data-driven practice using advanced launch monitoring equipment. Pricing is structured with hourly rates, multi-hour passes, and monthly memberships that include additional benefits like lessons discounts and merchandise perks.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to bays for flexible scheduling
Professional-grade TrackMan technology for precise swing and shot analysis
Competitive leagues and tournaments with prize incentives
Membership benefits including lessons discounts and merchandise perks
Kid-friendly policy with free access for children under 16

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service mentioned, BYOB likely allowed
No alcohol service mentioned, BYOB likely allowed

simulator_hardware.notes: Radar-based launch monitor with real-time data tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players must bring their own clubs as the facility does not provide club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are permitted, with no on-site catering or bar service mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The duration depends on simulator software and player pace, but typically ranges 1.5-2 hours per 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children under 16 play free when accompanied by a paying adult, making it family-friendly.
